paper_meaning: Emotion generation contrast: Look negative minus Look neutral, group one-sample t map.
view_tip: Use a signed color scale; positive means LookNeg > LookNeu.

paper_meaning: Reappraisal effect contrast: Regulate negative minus Look negative, group one-sample t map.
view_tip: Use a signed color scale; negative means RegNeg < LookNeg.

paper_meaning: Paper-style Bayes factor evidence for emotion generation; values are 2*log(BF10).
view_tip: Threshold around 4.6 for BF10 about 10; around -4.6 for BF10 about 0.1.

paper_meaning: Paper-style Bayes factor evidence for reappraisal effect; values are 2*log(BF10).
view_tip: Threshold around 4.6 for BF10 about 10; around -4.6 for BF10 about 0.1.

paper_meaning: Common appraisal system mask from BF/t logical rules.
view_tip: Binary mask: 1 means voxel belongs to the reproduced system.

paper_meaning: Reappraisal-only system mask from BF/t logical rules.
view_tip: Binary mask: 1 means voxel belongs to the reproduced system.

paper_meaning: Non-modifiable emotion system mask from BF/t logical rules.
view_tip: Binary mask: 1 means voxel belongs to the reproduced system.

paper_meaning: Modifiable emotion system mask from BF/t logical rules.
view_tip: Binary mask: 1 means voxel belongs to the reproduced system.
